# Feature PRD: [Feature Name]

## Status
Draft / In Progress / Complete

## Summary
Briefly describe what this feature does.

## User Problem
What problem does this solve for the user?

## User Story
As a [type of user], I want to [action], so that [benefit].

## Main User Flow
1. User does X
2. System responds with Y
3. User sees Z

## Requirements

### Must Have
- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2
- [ ] Requirement 3

### Nice to Have
- [ ] Nice-to-have 1
- [ ] Nice-to-have 2

## Out of Scope
- Thing we are intentionally not building
- Thing we are avoiding for the hackathon

## UX Notes
Describe layout, states, edge cases, and interaction details.

## Success Criteria
This feature is complete when:
- [ ] User can complete the main flow
- [ ] Empty state works
- [ ] Loading state works if needed
- [ ] Error state works if needed
- [ ] Feature supports the hackathon demo
